---
name: Artists requests
about: Use this template to request a design to the artists
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## Details

A detailed description of the design you need, where it will go on the website, how it will be used, how it should look, etc. Be detailed here.

## Colors

If the colors differ from the color palette of the website, explain it here.

## Page link

Link to the page where this design will appear. If a link is not needed or relevant, explain why.

## Example screenshot

If a screenshot with your notes or to the original Balto Source could be useful for the artist to understand the request, provide them.

## Image size

The exact size in pixels of the image that you need.

## Technical details

If there are technical details that you need to explain, do so here. Like transparency, extnsion, etc.

## File size

The maximum file size for this asset. The default should be 100 kb, can be adjusted up or down based on the size of the images.
